bead.title: Document pre-claim intake contract, failure-class mapping, and silent-idle diagnosis in README
bead.description:
PROBLEM
When ddx work --watch went silently idle on a full queue (fizeau, 2026-05-18), the only signal was the agent-loop JSONL, and the emitted `suggested_action` ("check the readiness route or harness configuration and retry") was misleading because the actual fault was DDx's own decoder. Operators had no documented contract or diagnosis path for silent-idle.

ROOT CAUSE
No README section names the pre-claim intake readiness contract, the failure-class mapping (warn vs operator-attention vs hard error), or how to diagnose silent-idle on a full queue.

PROPOSED FIX
Add a README section documenting (a) the pre-claim intake readiness contract — the shared schema and accepted verdict kinds; (b) the failure-class mapping — warn-only vs operator-attention escalation vs hard error; (c) the same-fingerprint escalation and the rolling claim-success-rate warning; and (d) operator diagnosis steps for silent-idle, including the agent-loop JSONL location and the repeated-fingerprint signal.

NON-SCOPE
Documentation only — does NOT change decoder, schema, escalation, or claim-rate behavior. DEPENDS ON the decoder, schema, escalation, and claim-rate children (documents their behavior); land after them.
bead.acceptance:
1. README documents the pre-claim intake contract (shared readiness schema and accepted verdict kinds), the failure-class mapping (warn / operator-attention / hard error), the same-fingerprint escalation and rolling claim-success-rate warning, and silent-idle diagnosis steps. Asserted by `TestReadmeDocumentsPreClaimIntakeContract` in `cli/cmd/readme_preclaim_intake_test.go`.
2. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... green
3. lefthook run pre-commit passes
